parameters.apprise_url_plus: smseagles://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.host_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own SMS Eagle destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise smseagles:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway / gateway-plus transformer channels instead POST a native SMSEagle JSON-RPC payload directly to your SMSEagle device, bypassing Apprise.
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"params":{"access_token":"${ customer_secrets.SMSEAGLE_SMS_TOKEN }","to":"${ customer_secrets.SMSEAGLE_SMS_TARGETS }","message":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}}
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your SMSEagle device JSON-RPC API (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment SMSEagle destinations, direct

host_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's SMS Eagle host

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's SMS Eagle targets

token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's SMS Eagle token
